name: Grenadier (i) (SS-210)
events: 4 Feb 1942 USS Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. Allen R. Joyce) departed from Pearl Harbor for her 1st war patrol. She was ordered to patrol off Honshu in Japanese home waters.
7 Mar 1942 USS Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. A.R. Joyce) torpedoed and damaged the Japanese transport ship Asahisan Maru (4551 GRT) south of Shioyasaki, Japan in position 36°27'N, 141°06'E.
23 Mar 1942 USS Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. Allen R. Joyce) ended her 1st war patrol at Pearl Harbor.
11 Apr 1942 USS Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. Willis Ashford Lent) departed Pearl Harbor for her 2nd war patrol and was ordered to patrol in the East China Sea.

1 May 1942 USS Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Lent) mistakenly torpedoed and sank the Russian merchant ship Angarstroi (4760 GRT) about 90 nautical miles west-south-west of Nagasaki, Japan in position 32°00'N, 129°25'E.
8 May 1942 USS Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Lent) torpedoed and sank the Japanese transport ship Taiyo Maru (14503 GRT) about 120 nautical miles southwest of Kyushu, Japan in position 30°40'N, 127°54'E.
8 Jun 1942 USS Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Lent) ended her 2nd war patrol at Pearl Harbor.

13 Oct 1942 After an uneventful 3th war patrol, which ended at Fremantle, Australia, USS Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. Bruce L. Carr) departed and commenced her 4th war patrol and was ordered to lay a minefield off Haiphong, Indochina once completed then patrol in the South China Sea.
29 Oct 1942 Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. B.L. Carr) lays mines in the Tonkin Gulf off Haiphong, Indochina.
12 Nov 1942 USS Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. B.L. Carr) torpedoed and damaged the Japanese transport ship Hokkai Maru (8416 GRT) off the south coast of French Indochina in position 11°18'N, 109°02'E.
10 Dec 1942 USS Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. Bruce L. Carr) ended her 4th war patrol at Fremantle.
1 Jan 1943 USS Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. John Allison Fitzgerald) departed from Fremantle for her 5th war patrol. She was ordered to patrol in the South China Sea.
10 Jan 1943 USS Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. J.A. Fitzgerald) sank a Japanese sampan with gunfire north off Java, Netherlands East Indies in position 06°18'S, 112°44'E.
20 Feb 1943 USS Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. J.A. Fitzgerald) ended her 5th war patrol at Fremantle.
15 Mar 1943 HrMs Tromp (Capt. J.B. de Meester, RNN) conducted exercises off Fremantle together with USS Grenadier (Cdr. J.A. Fitzgerald, USN). (1)
16 Mar 1943 HrMs Tromp (Capt. J.B. de Meester, RNN) conducted exercises off Fremantle together with USS Isabel (Lt. F.D. Buckley, USN) and USS Grenadier (Cdr. J.A. Fitzgerald, USN). (1)
20 Mar 1943 USS Grenadier (Lt.Cdr. J.A. Fitzgerald) departed Fremantle for her 6th war patrol. She was ordered to patrol in the Strait of Malacca.
